zone_specs:
FLOOR 1 (z = 0.00 to 3.00 m, ceiling height 3.00 m):
 Zone_F1_SW: office, x [0.00, 4.90], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑left).
 Zone_F1_SM: office, x [4.90, 10.10], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑middle).
 Zone_F1_SE: office, x [10.10, 15.00], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑right).
 Zone_F1_C: corridor, x [0.00, 15.00], y [3.00, 5.00], role = corridor.
 Zone_F1_NW: office, x [0.00, 4.90], y [5.00, 8.00], role = office (top‑left).
 Zone_F1_NM: office, x [4.90, 10.10], y [5.00, 8.00], role = office (top‑middle).
 Zone_F1_NE: office, x [10.10, 15.00], y [5.00, 8.00], role = office (top‑right).

FLOOR 2 (z = 3.00 to 6.60 m, ceiling height 3.60 m):
 Zone_F2_SW: office, x [0.00, 4.95], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑office‑1).
 Zone_F2_SM1: office, x [4.95, 7.50], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑office‑2).
 Zone_F2_SM2: office, x [7.50, 10.05], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑office‑3).
 Zone_F2_SE: office, x [10.05, 15.00], y [0.00, 3.00], role = office (bottom‑office‑4).
 Zone_F2_C: corridor, x [0.00, 15.00], y [3.00, 5.00], role = corridor.
 Zone_F2_NW: office, x [0.00, 7.50], y [5.00, 8.00], role = office (top‑meeting‑left).
 Zone_F2_NE: office, x [7.50, 15.00], y [5.00, 8.00], role = office (top‑meeting‑right).
material_specs:
# Materials for opaque constructions (all values typical for lightweight office)

Material: Mat_Stucco
  Roughness = MediumRough, Conductivity = 0.72 W/(m·K), Density = 1856 kg/m³, Specific Heat = 840 J/(kg·K)

Material: Mat_Insulation
  Roughness = MediumRough, Conductivity = 0.04 W/(m·K), Density = 32 kg/m³, Specific Heat = 1210 J/(kg·K)

Material: Mat_Gypsum
  Roughness = Smooth, Conductivity = 0.16 W/(m·K), Density = 801 kg/m³, Specific Heat = 1090 J/(kg·K)

Material: Mat_Concrete
  Roughness = MediumRough, Conductivity = 1.73 W/(m·K), Density = 2243 kg/m³, Specific Heat = 837 J/(kg·K)

Material: Mat_Floor_Concrete (for interzone floor)
  Roughness = MediumRough, Conductivity = 1.73 W/(m·K), Density = 2243 kg/m³, Specific Heat = 837 J/(kg·K)

Material: Mat_Membrane
  Roughness = VerySmooth, Conductivity = 0.16 W/(m·K), Density = 1121 kg/m³, Specific Heat = 1460 J/(kg·K)
schedule_specs:
All schedules use compact schedule format. Defined schedules:

Schedule: Office_Occupancy  (ScheduleTypeLimits = Fraction, 0‑1)
  For Weekdays: Until 09:00 = 0, Until 18:00 = 1, Until 24:00 = 0
  For Weekends/Holidays: 0 all day

Schedule: Office_Lighting   (ScheduleTypeLimits = Fraction)
  Same profile as Office_Occupancy

Schedule: Office_HVAC_Avail  (ScheduleTypeLimits = On/Off)
  Same times: 09:00–18:00 = 1 (On), else 0

Schedule: Office_Cooling_Setpoint  (ScheduleTypeLimits = Temperature)
  All days, constant 24 °C

Schedule: Office_Heating_Setpoint  (ScheduleTypeLimits = Temperature)
  All days, constant 20 °C

Schedule: Office_Activity          (ScheduleTypeLimits = Activity Level)
  All days, constant 120 W/person
construction_specs:
# Construction assemblies

Construction: Default_Ext_Wall
  Layers (outside to inside): Mat_Stucco (0.025 m), Mat_Insulation (0.05 m), Mat_Gypsum (0.015 m)

Construction: Default_Int_Wall
  Layers: Mat_Gypsum (0.015 m)   [single layer, symmetric]

Construction: Default_Window
  WindowMaterial:SimpleGlazingSystem
  U-Factor = 2.0 W/(m²·K), SHGC = 0.5

Construction: Default_GroundFloor
  Layers: Mat_Concrete (0.2 m), Mat_Insulation (0.05 m)

Construction: Default_Roof
  Layers: Mat_Membrane (0.01 m), Mat_Insulation (0.1 m), Mat_Concrete (0.2 m)

Construction: Cons_InterFloor   (used for all interzone floor/ceiling pairs – single layer palindromic)
  Layers: Mat_Floor_Concrete (0.2 m)
surface_specs:
All surfaces are rectangular unless otherwise noted. Vertices are given CCW from the outside (as seen from the adjacent space). World coordinates in metres; origin at SW corner of footprint, ground z = 0.

=== CONSTRUCTION NAMES referenced ===
 ExtWall   : Default_Ext_Wall
 IntWall   : Default_Int_Wall
 GroundFlr : Default_GroundFloor
 Roof      : Default_Roof
 InterFlr  : Cons_InterFloor

==========================================================
FLOOR 1 SURFACES
==========================================================
Note: F1 floor = ground (z=0), ceiling = z=3.0 (inter‑zone with F2 floor).

--- Zone_F1_SW (x[0,4.9] y[0,3] z[0,3]) ---
1. Zone_F1_SW_WallSouth : Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (0,0,3) (4.9,0,3) (4.9,0,0) (0,0,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F1_SW_WallEast  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SM.  Vertices (4.9,0,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,3,0) (4.9,0,0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F1_SW_WallNorth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_C.  Vertices (0,3,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,3,0) (0,3,0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F1_SW_WallWest  : Exterior wall, x=0.  Vertices (0,0,3) (0,3,3) (0,3,0) (0,0,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
5. Zone_F1_SW_Floor     : Ground floor.  Vertices (0,0,0) (4.9,0,0) (4.9,3,0) (0,3,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
6. Zone_F1_SW_Ceiling   : Inter‑zone ceiling.  Parent of floor‑to‑ceiling pair with F2; will be split at combined x‑breaks (0, 4.9, 4.95, 7.5, 10.05, 10.1, 15).
                         See end of this section for the split‑pairing list.

--- Zone_F1_SM (x[4.9,10.1] y[0,3] z[0,3]) ---
1. Zone_F1_SM_WallSouth : Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (4.9,0,3) (10.1,0,3) (10.1,0,0) (4.9,0,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F1_SM_WallEast  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SE.  Vertices (10.1,0,3) (10.1,3,3) (10.1,3,0) (10.1,0,0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F1_SM_WallNorth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_C.  Vertices (4.9,3,3) (10.1,3,3) (10.1,3,0) (4.9,3,0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F1_SM_WallWest  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SW.  Vertices (4.9,0,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,3,0) (4.9,0,0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F1_SM_Floor     : Ground floor.  Vertices (4.9,0,0) (10.1,0,0) (10.1,3,0) (4.9,3,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
6. Zone_F1_SM_Ceiling   : Inter‑zone ceiling (paired with F2 floor, see split list).

--- Zone_F1_SE (x[10.1,15] y[0,3] z[0,3]) ---
1. Zone_F1_SE_WallSouth : Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (10.1,0,3) (15,0,3) (15,0,0) (10.1,0,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F1_SE_WallEast  : Exterior wall, x=15.  Vertices (15,0,3) (15,3,3) (15,3,0) (15,0,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
3. Zone_F1_SE_WallNorth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_C.  Vertices (10.1,3,3) (15,3,3) (15,3,0) (10.1,3,0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F1_SE_WallWest  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SM.  Vertices (10.1,0,3) (10.1,3,3) (10.1,3,0) (10.1,0,0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F1_SE_Floor     : Ground floor.  Vertices (10.1,0,0) (15,0,0) (15,3,0) (10.1,3,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
6. Zone_F1_SE_Ceiling   : Inter‑zone ceiling (paired with F2 floor, see split list).

--- Zone_F1_C (x[0,15] y[3,5] z[0,3]) ---
 The corridor South-Wall at y=3 is split into three sub‑surfaces according to the offices below:
   Zone_F1_C_WallSouth_SW  : x[0, 4.9]   adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SW.  Vertices (0,3,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,3,0) (0,3,0).  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F1_C_WallSouth_SM  : x[4.9,10.1] adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SM.  Vertices (4.9,3,3) (10.1,3,3) (10.1,3,0) (4.9,3,0).  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F1_C_WallSouth_SE  : x[10.1,15]  adjacent zone = Zone_F1_SE.  Vertices (10.1,3,3) (15,3,3) (15,3,0) (10.1,3,0).  Construction = IntWall.
 Similarly the North‑Wall at y=5 is split into three sub‑surfaces for the offices above:
   Zone_F1_C_WallNorth_NW  : x[0, 4.9]   adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NW.  Vertices (4.9,5,3) (0,5,3) (0,5,0) (4.9,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F1_C_WallNorth_NM  : x[4.9,10.1] adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NM.  Vertices (10.1,5,3) (4.9,5,3) (4.9,5,0) (10.1,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F1_C_WallNorth_NE  : x[10.1,15]  adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NE.  Vertices (15,5,3) (10.1,5,3) (10.1,5,0) (15,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
 East Wall (exterior): Vertices (15,3,3) (15,5,3) (15,5,0) (15,3,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
 West Wall (exterior): Vertices (0,3,3) (0,5,3) (0,5,0) (0,3,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
 Floor (ground): Vertices (0,3,0) (15,3,0) (15,5,0) (0,5,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
 Ceiling (inter‑zone, pairs with F2 corridor floor): see split list.

--- Zone_F1_NW (x[0,4.9] y[5,8] z[0,3]) ---
1. Zone_F1_NW_WallSouth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_C (north sub‑surface NW).  Vertices (4.9,5,3) (0,5,3) (0,5,0) (4.9,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
2. Zone_F1_NW_WallEast  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NM.  Vertices (4.9,5,3) (4.9,8,3) (4.9,8,0) (4.9,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F1_NW_WallNorth : Exterior wall, y=8.  Vertices (0,8,3) (4.9,8,3) (4.9,8,0) (0,8,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
4. Zone_F1_NW_WallWest  : Exterior wall, x=0.  Vertices (0,5,3) (0,8,3) (0,8,0) (0,5,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
5. Zone_F1_NW_Floor     : Ground floor.  Vertices (0,5,0) (4.9,5,0) (4.9,8,0) (0,8,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
6. Zone_F1_NW_Ceiling   : Inter‑zone ceiling (paired with F2 floor, see split list).

--- Zone_F1_NM (x[4.9,10.1] y[5,8] z[0,3]) ---
1. Zone_F1_NM_WallSouth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_C (north sub‑surface NM).  Vertices (10.1,5,3) (4.9,5,3) (4.9,5,0) (10.1,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
2. Zone_F1_NM_WallEast  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NE.  Vertices (10.1,5,3) (10.1,8,3) (10.1,8,0) (10.1,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F1_NM_WallNorth : Exterior wall, y=8.  Vertices (4.9,8,3) (10.1,8,3) (10.1,8,0) (4.9,8,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
4. Zone_F1_NM_WallWest  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NW.  Vertices (4.9,5,3) (4.9,8,3) (4.9,8,0) (4.9,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F1_NM_Floor     : Ground floor.  Vertices (4.9,5,0) (10.1,5,0) (10.1,8,0) (4.9,8,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
6. Zone_F1_NM_Ceiling   : Inter‑zone ceiling (paired, see split list).

--- Zone_F1_NE (x[10.1,15] y[5,8] z[0,3]) ---
1. Zone_F1_NE_WallSouth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_C (north sub‑surface NE).  Vertices (15,5,3) (10.1,5,3) (10.1,5,0) (15,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
2. Zone_F1_NE_WallEast  : Exterior wall, x=15.  Vertices (15,5,3) (15,8,3) (15,8,0) (15,5,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
3. Zone_F1_NE_WallNorth : Exterior wall, y=8.  Vertices (10.1,8,3) (15,8,3) (15,8,0) (10.1,8,0).  Construction = ExtWall.
4. Zone_F1_NE_WallWest  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F1_NM.  Vertices (10.1,5,3) (10.1,8,3) (10.1,8,0) (10.1,5,0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F1_NE_Floor     : Ground floor.  Vertices (10.1,5,0) (15,5,0) (15,8,0) (10.1,8,0).  Construction = GroundFlr.
6. Zone_F1_NE_Ceiling   : Inter‑zone ceiling (paired, see split list).

==========================================================
FLOOR 2 SURFACES
==========================================================
Note: F2 floor = z=3.0 (inter‑zone with F1 ceiling), ceiling = z=6.6 (roof).

--- Zone_F2_SW (x[0,4.95] y[0,3] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
1. Zone_F2_SW_WallSouth : Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (0,0,6.6) (4.95,0,6.6) (4.95,0,3.0) (0,0,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F2_SW_WallEast  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_SM1.  Vertices (4.95,0,6.6) (4.95,3,6.6) (4.95,3,3.0) (4.95,0,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F2_SW_WallNorth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_C.  Vertices (0,3,6.6) (4.95,3,6.6) (4.95,3,3.0) (0,3,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F2_SW_WallWest  : Exterior wall, x=0.  Vertices (0,0,6.6) (0,3,6.6) (0,3,3.0) (0,0,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
5. Zone_F2_SW_Floor     : Inter‑zone floor (pairs with F1 ceiling, see split list).
6. Zone_F2_SW_Roof      : Roof.  Vertices (0,3,6.6) (4.95,3,6.6) (4.95,0,6.6) (0,0,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

--- Zone_F2_SM1 (x[4.95,7.5] y[0,3] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
1. Zone_F2_SM1_WallSouth: Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (4.95,0,6.6) (7.5,0,6.6) (7.5,0,3.0) (4.95,0,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F2_SM1_WallEast : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_SM2.  Vertices (7.5,0,6.6) (7.5,3,6.6) (7.5,3,3.0) (7.5,0,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F2_SM1_WallNorth: Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_C.  Vertices (4.95,3,6.6) (7.5,3,6.6) (7.5,3,3.0) (4.95,3,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F2_SM1_WallWest : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_SW.  Vertices (4.95,0,6.6) (4.95,3,6.6) (4.95,3,3.0) (4.95,0,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F2_SM1_Floor    : Inter‑zone floor (see split list).
6. Zone_F2_SM1_Roof     : Roof.  Vertices (4.95,3,6.6) (7.5,3,6.6) (7.5,0,6.6) (4.95,0,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

--- Zone_F2_SM2 (x[7.5,10.05] y[0,3] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
1. Zone_F2_SM2_WallSouth: Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (7.5,0,6.6) (10.05,0,6.6) (10.05,0,3.0) (7.5,0,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F2_SM2_WallEast : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_SE.  Vertices (10.05,0,6.6) (10.05,3,6.6) (10.05,3,3.0) (10.05,0,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F2_SM2_WallNorth: Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_C.  Vertices (7.5,3,6.6) (10.05,3,6.6) (10.05,3,3.0) (7.5,3,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F2_SM2_WallWest : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_SM1.  Vertices (7.5,0,6.6) (7.5,3,6.6) (7.5,3,3.0) (7.5,0,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F2_SM2_Floor    : Inter‑zone floor (see split list).
6. Zone_F2_SM2_Roof     : Roof.  Vertices (7.5,3,6.6) (10.05,3,6.6) (10.05,0,6.6) (7.5,0,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

--- Zone_F2_SE (x[10.05,15] y[0,3] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
1. Zone_F2_SE_WallSouth : Exterior wall, y=0.  Vertices (10.05,0,6.6) (15,0,6.6) (15,0,3.0) (10.05,0,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
2. Zone_F2_SE_WallEast  : Exterior wall, x=15.  Vertices (15,0,6.6) (15,3,6.6) (15,3,3.0) (15,0,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
3. Zone_F2_SE_WallNorth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_C.  Vertices (10.05,3,6.6) (15,3,6.6) (15,3,3.0) (10.05,3,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
4. Zone_F2_SE_WallWest  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_SM2.  Vertices (10.05,0,6.6) (10.05,3,6.6) (10.05,3,3.0) (10.05,0,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F2_SE_Floor     : Inter‑zone floor (see split list).
6. Zone_F2_SE_Roof      : Roof.  Vertices (10.05,3,6.6) (15,3,6.6) (15,0,6.6) (10.05,0,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

--- Zone_F2_C (x[0,15] y[3,5] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
 South wall at y=3 (interior):
   Zone_F2_C_WallSouth_SW   : x[0,4.95]  adjacent = Zone_F2_SW.  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F2_C_WallSouth_SM1  : x[4.95,7.5] adjacent = Zone_F2_SM1.  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F2_C_WallSouth_SM2  : x[7.5,10.05] adjacent = Zone_F2_SM2.  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F2_C_WallSouth_SE   : x[10.05,15] adjacent = Zone_F2_SE.  Construction = IntWall.
 North wall at y=5 (interior):
   Zone_F2_C_WallNorth_NW   : x[0,7.5]   adjacent = Zone_F2_NW.  Construction = IntWall.
   Zone_F2_C_WallNorth_NE   : x[7.5,15]  adjacent = Zone_F2_NE.  Construction = IntWall.
 East Wall (exterior): Vertices (15,3,6.6)(15,5,6.6)(15,5,3.0)(15,3,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
 West Wall (exterior): Vertices (0,3,6.6)(0,5,6.6)(0,5,3.0)(0,3,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
 Floor: Inter‑zone (paired with F1 corridor ceiling, whole footprint, no splits needed).
   Zone_F2_C_Floor  vertices (0,3,3.0) (15,3,3.0) (15,5,3.0) (0,5,3.0).  Construction = InterFlr.
 Roof: Vertices (0,5,6.6) (15,5,6.6) (15,3,6.6) (0,3,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

--- Zone_F2_NW (x[0,7.5] y[5,8] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
1. Zone_F2_NW_WallSouth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_C (north sub‑surface NW).  Vertices (7.5,5,6.6)(0,5,6.6)(0,5,3.0)(7.5,5,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
2. Zone_F2_NW_WallEast  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_NE.  Vertices (7.5,5,6.6)(7.5,8,6.6)(7.5,8,3.0)(7.5,5,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
3. Zone_F2_NW_WallNorth : Exterior wall, y=8.  Vertices (0,8,6.6)(7.5,8,6.6)(7.5,8,3.0)(0,8,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
4. Zone_F2_NW_WallWest  : Exterior wall, x=0.  Vertices (0,5,6.6)(0,8,6.6)(0,8,3.0)(0,5,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
5. Zone_F2_NW_Floor     : Inter‑zone floor (see split list).
6. Zone_F2_NW_Roof      : Roof.  Vertices (0,8,6.6)(7.5,8,6.6)(7.5,5,6.6)(0,5,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

--- Zone_F2_NE (x[7.5,15] y[5,8] z[3.0,6.6]) ---
1. Zone_F2_NE_WallSouth : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_C (north sub‑surface NE).  Vertices (15,5,6.6)(7.5,5,6.6)(7.5,5,3.0)(15,5,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
2. Zone_F2_NE_WallEast  : Exterior wall, x=15.  Vertices (15,5,6.6)(15,8,6.6)(15,8,3.0)(15,5,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
3. Zone_F2_NE_WallNorth : Exterior wall, y=8.  Vertices (7.5,8,6.6)(15,8,6.6)(15,8,3.0)(7.5,8,3.0).  Construction = ExtWall.
4. Zone_F2_NE_WallWest  : Interior, adjacent zone = Zone_F2_NW.  Vertices (7.5,5,6.6)(7.5,8,6.6)(7.5,8,3.0)(7.5,5,3.0).  Construction = IntWall.
5. Zone_F2_NE_Floor     : Inter‑zone floor (see split list).
6. Zone_F2_NE_Roof      : Roof.  Vertices (7.5,8,6.6)(15,8,6.6)(15,5,6.6)(7.5,5,6.6).  Construction = Roof.

==========================================================
CROSS‑FLOOR SPLIT‑PAIRINGS (F1 ceiling ↔ F2 floor)
==========================================================
Construction = InterFlr for every piece.
Combined x‑break points (union of both floor plans): 0, 4.9, 4.95, 7.5, 10.05, 10.1, 15.
For bottom band (y 0‑3):
  x[0,4.9]   : Zone_F1_SW ceiling  ↔ Zone_F2_SW floor.
  x[4.9,4.95]: Zone_F1_SM ceiling  ↔ Zone_F2_SW floor. (Note: F1 SM starts at 4.9, F2 SW ends at 4.95)
  x[4.95,7.5]: Zone_F1_SM ceiling  ↔ Zone_F2_SM1 floor.
  x[7.5,10.05]: Zone_F1_SM ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_SM2 floor.
  x[10.05,10.1]: Zone_F1_SM ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_SE floor.
  x[10.1,15] : Zone_F1_SE ceiling  ↔ Zone_F2_SE floor.
For top band (y 5‑8):
  x[0,4.9]   : Zone_F1_NW ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_NW floor.
  x[4.9,7.5] : Zone_F1_NM ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_NW floor.
  x[7.5,10.1]: Zone_F1_NM ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_NE floor.
  x[10.1,15] : Zone_F1_NE ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_NE floor.
Corridor (y 3‑5): whole footprint (0‑15) single pairing:
  Zone_F1_C ceiling ↔ Zone_F2_C floor.

hvac_specs:
All thermal zones use IdealLoadsAirSystem.  For each zone:
- ZoneHVAC:IdealLoadsAirSystem
  Availability Schedule = Office_HVAC_Avail
  Thermostat Cooling Setpoint = Office_Cooling_Setpoint
  Thermostat Heating Setpoint = Office_Heating_Setpoint
  Outdoor Air Method = ZoneSum
  Outdoor Air Flow per Person = 0.01 m³/s  (typical office)
  No mechanical ventilation per floor area.

All 14 zones (F1 x7 + F2 x7) get identical HVAC setup.
people_specs:
People object for every office zone (all F1/F2 offices).  Corridor zones (F1_C, F2_C) have NO people.
  Zone list: Zone_F1_SW, Zone_F1_SM, Zone_F1_SE, Zone_F1_NW, Zone_F1_NM, Zone_F1_NE,
             Zone_F2_SW, Zone_F2_SM1, Zone_F2_SM2, Zone_F2_SE, Zone_F2_NW, Zone_F2_NE.
  Density = 0.1 persons/m²  (10 m²/person)
  Number of People Schedule = Office_Occupancy
  Activity Level Schedule = Office_Activity
  Fraction Radiant = 0.3, Sensible Heat Fraction = 0.6
lights_specs:
Lights object for every office zone (same list as people).
  Design Level = 10 W/m²
  Schedule = Office_Lighting
  Fraction Radiant = 0.37, Fraction Visible = 0.18
  Return Air Fraction = 0.0
